description: Fetch casts based on filters. Ensure setting the correct parameters based on the feed_type and filter_type.

parameters.name: feed_type
parameters.description: Defaults to following (requires FID or address). If set to filter (requires filter_type)

parameters.name: filter_type
parameters.description: Used when feed_type=filter. Options include fids (requires fids), parent_url (requires parent_url), channel_id (requires channel_id), embed_url (requires embed_url), embed_types (requires embed_types), or global_trending.

parameters.name: fid
parameters.description: (Optional) FID of user whose feed you want to create. By default, the API expects this field, except if you pass a filter_type

parameters.name: fids
parameters.description: Used when filter_type=FIDs . Create a feed based on a list of FIDs. Max array size is 100. Requires feed_type and filter_type.

parameters.name: parent_url
parameters.description: Used when filter_type=parent_url can be used to fetch content under any parent url e.g. FIP-2 channels on Warpcast. Requires feed_type and filter_type.

parameters.name: channel_id
parameters.description: Used when filter_type=channel_id can be used to fetch casts under a channel. Requires feed_type and filter_type.

parameters.name: members_only
parameters.description: Used when filter_type=channel_id. Only include casts from members of the channel. True by default.

parameters.name: embed_url
parameters.description: Used when filter_type=embed_url. Casts with embedded URLs prefixed by this embed_url param will be returned. We normalize your given URL prefix and prepend 'https://' if no protocol is included. Requires feed_type and filter_type.

parameters.name: embed_types
parameters.description: Used when filter_type=embed_types can be used to fetch all casts with matching content types. Requires feed_type and filter_type.

items.description: The content type of the embedded file
items.title: EmbedType

parameters.name: with_recasts
parameters.description: Include recasts in the response, true by default

parameters.name: viewer_fid
parameters.description: Providing this will return a feed that respects this user's mutes and blocks and includes `viewer_context`.
